summary: Adopt two build practices from YanWenKun/ComfyUI-Docker: (1) RUN --quick-test-for-ci --cpu after the node bake so an import failure fails the BUILD (the MPI-149 kornia/LTXVideo class that shipped and died live as Node Stage1_Bypass not found; also automates the hand-run '8 nodes register' gate from MPI-139); (2) pip constraints file pinning the cu130 trio so torch drift is unresolvable, with the MPI-244 assert kept as the belt. Blocked on MPI-340 - build to the dev tag, never rebuild released v0.16.0.
